text: In a land far removed from the clutters of humankind, there lives a wise old owl named Oliva. Oliva is no ordinary owl; she spends her days porING over ancient tomes filled with magical lore. One night, while listening to the gentle rustle of leaves, she hears a whisper—a song only she can comprehend. curious, she follows the melody to a clearing where a shimmering lake reflects the stars. There, a human child, orphaned from wandering far from home, cries lonely tears. Oliva offers her wisdom, teaching the child the secrets of magic. The child learns to control dreams and whispers secrets into the night. As they grow, they become protectors of legend, weaving stories into reality.
